summary: Completed iteration 18 testing: All new features verified. Fixed route ordering bug in /api/bookings/history. 13/13 backend tests pass, all frontend features working correctly.

issues: Google Maps billing error showing 'Oops! Something went wrong' - known issue, not a code bug

passed_tests: GET /api/providers returns providers with is_featured and is_verified_only fields
GET /api/providers sorted correctly: featured (verified+subscribed) -> verified_only -> rest
GET /api/providers/{id} returns is_featured field for individual provider
GET /api/bookings/history returns service history for authenticated user (provider or client)
GET /api/subscription/invoices returns billing history with plan_name, amount, status
GET /api/sos/info returns is_available, schedule_text, current_hour based on admin config
PUT /api/admin/sos accepts start_hour and end_hour fields (tested with values 8 and 20)
GET /api/admin/sos returns start_hour and end_hour in config
Search page (/search) loads provider list sorted correctly
ServiceHistory page (/historial) loads with Servicios and Facturas tabs
ServiceHistory Facturas tab shows subscription payment at $9,990 Pendiente
Client Dashboard has 'Historial' card link to /historial
Provider Dashboard has 'Historial y Facturas' button
Provider Dashboard shows SOS section with schedule_text '8:00 - 20:00 hrs'
Provider Dashboard SOS 'Llamar' button visible (provider is subscribed, within hours)
Navbar user dropdown shows 'Historial y Facturas' link
Provider registration page (/provider/register) shows photo tip about uploading with pets
Provider gallery in dashboard shows photo tip suggesting photos with pets
Admin Panel SOS config tab has start_hour and end_hour numeric inputs

bugs_fixed.issue: Route /api/bookings/history was defined AFTER /api/bookings/{booking_id}, causing 'history' to be matched as booking_id
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved /api/bookings/history and /api/bookings/stats/summary routes BEFORE the dynamic /{booking_id} route

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified via Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified new features: 1) Provider sorting by featured status (verified+subscribed first). 2) Service History page with Servicios and Facturas tabs. 3) Subscription invoices endpoint. 4) SOS button scheduling with admin-configurable start_hour/end_hour. 5) Photo tips for carers. Fixed route ordering bug for /api/bookings/history. Note: Featured badge ('Destacado') only shows when provider is BOTH verified AND has active subscription simultaneously - currently 0 providers meet this criteria.

features_verified.providers_featured_sorting: ✓ is_featured and is_verified_only fields present, correct sorting
features_verified.service_history_api: ✓ GET /api/bookings/history works for both providers and clients
features_verified.provider_registration_tip: ✓ Photo tip about uploading with pets
features_verified.gallery_photo_tip: ✓ Tip suggesting photos with pets (shows when <3 photos)
features_verified.admin_sos_config: ✓ start_hour and end_hour inputs with values 8 and 20
features_verified.provider_sos_section: ✓ Shows schedule_text '8:00 - 20:00 hrs', Llamar button active
